source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for clean research UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, and dense data views.
layout: Precise research grids, 8px component radius, fine speckled dividers, restrained shadows, and arctic-tundra data surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent snowy owl plumage motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for public/systems/morphous-snowy-owl/motif.png
Primary request: Create only a snowy owl plumage motif: a compact elegant feather cluster and partial owl facial disk abstraction, white downy feathers with black speckles and barred markings, pale ice-blue undertones, isolated full subject, no text.
Subject: Snowy owl plumage from arctic tundra, clean research-system mood, crisp white feathers, black speckle pattern, subtle ice-blue shadowing, refined natural texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; no cropped feather tips; subject fills most of frame but stays separated from edges.
Lighting/mood: clear arctic daylight, clinical clean research system, high detail, quiet precision.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no full environment, no branch, no prey, no typography, no watermark, no cartoon style, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for public/systems/morphous-snowy-owl/design-system-light.png
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Snowy Owl" derived from snowy owl plumage in arctic tundra.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution source board, clean readable labels.
Motif and palette: snowy owl plumage, soft snow white, feather white, black speckles, charcoal ink, ice blue, glacial blue-gray, pale silver, arctic slate. Clean research system feel, quiet precision, data-ready components.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowy Owl, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; text must be large and legible in preview.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metrics, charts, data table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Design language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, 8px card radius, fine speckled dividers inspired by owl feather markings, restrained ice-blue focus states, precise research dashboard layout, clean lab-notebook hierarchy.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no beige theme, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Snowy Owl".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for public/systems/morphous-snowy-owl/design-system-dark.png
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode companion board for the same Morphous theme named "Morphous Snowy Owl". It must feel like the light board translated to dark mode, not a different theme.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, wide 16:9, high-resolution source board, clean readable labels.
Motif and palette: snowy owl plumage in arctic tundra, snow white text, black feather speckles, charcoal and arctic night surfaces, ice blue focus, glacial blue-gray, pale silver borders. Clean research system feel, quiet precision, data-ready components.
Required visible sections: Morphous Snowy Owl, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance; text must be large and legible in preview.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metrics, charts, data table, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Design language: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, 8px card radius, feather-speckle dividers, restrained ice-blue focus states, arctic-night research dashboard layout, crisp contrast and careful hierarchy.
Constraints: no neon overload, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure black only, no random brand names, no watermark, no tiny illegible token tables, no misspelling of "Morphous Snowy Owl".
